description: A blocking pipeline stage exceeds the 100MB memory limit and spills or fails.
body: Failure mode: a $group or in-memory $sort processing a large unfiltered input exceeds the 100MB per-stage memory limit, so the stage either errors (without allowDiskUse) or spills to disk and runs far slower. Detection signals: the pipeline errors with QueryExceededMemoryLimitNoDiskUseAllowed, or explain reports usedDisk true with high executionTimeMillis. Do not place a blocking stage before filtering the input. Safer fallback: move $match before the blocking stage so an index shrinks the input, $project away unneeded fields, and enable allowDiskUse only as a deliberate last resort for genuinely large aggregations.
